slides.heading: People
slides.content: 'Sensei' means teacher, and 'Gakusei' means student. You are a Gakusei!

slides.heading: Animals
slides.content: 'Neko' is cat and 'Inu' is dog. These are the most common pets in Japan.

slides.heading: Food
slides.content: 'Gohan' means both 'meal' and 'cooked rice'. It is the heart of Japanese cuisine.

slides.heading: Drinks
slides.content: 'Mizu' is water. If you want tea, ask for 'Ocha'.

slides.heading: Objects
slides.content: 'Hon' is book, and 'Kuruma' is car. Try labeling things in your room!
